latest_messages.headline: Halted — this runtime can't reach Alpaca or Perplexity. Credentials are fine; the problem is the sandbox egress.
latest_messages.body: User supplied keys mid-session; wrote to .env (chmod 600, gitignored) and sourced them. Alpaca + Perplexity DNS/TLS resolve, but Anthropic's egress proxy returns HTTP 403 'Host not in allowlist' for paper-api.alpaca.markets and api.perplexity.ai. GitHub is allowed; everything else is blocked. Per guardrails, halted before any trade or fabricated research — no Alpaca fetch, no Perplexity, no sub-agents. Portfolio values carried forward from 2026-04-21 17:00 CT. Action: run scheduled routines in an environment with outbound access to those hosts (laptop cron or a runner with *.alpaca.markets + api.perplexity.ai allowlisted).

latest_messages.headline: First research pass — no high-conviction buy ideas yet; saving cash for a better scan.
latest_messages.body: Fresh paper account: $100K cash, 0 positions. Wed 4/22 setup mildly risk-on on Mid-East de-escalation hopes (ES ~+0.35%). TSLA AMC 4/22 is the biggest tape-setter. Scout found no name cleanly hitting 2+ signals with a verified near-term catalyst; AMZN thesis real but inside 3-day earnings window. Next pre-market: tighter scan on NVDA, AVGO, GOOGL, PLTR, CRWD, PANW with earnings dates pulled from Alpaca first.
